name: Jessica Jackson
ai_summary: Jessica is an Atlanta-based educator with over 16 years of childcare experience spanning infants to after-school, holding a CD and early childhood education credits, seeking full-time or part-time within 30 miles. She is a punctual, professional teacher skilled in classroom management, lesson planning, and nurturing social-emotional growth through patient guidance.
